title: Pananchery Mudikkode Shiva Temple
tagline: Pananchery Mudikkode Shiva Temple — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: Pananchery Mudikkode Shiva Temple is an ancient Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva at Pananchery of Thrissur District in Kerala state in India.
overview.description: Pananchery Mudikkode Shiva Temple is an ancient Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva at Pananchery of Thrissur District in Kerala state in India. The presiding deity of the temple is Shiva, located in main Sanctum Sanctorum, facing West. According to folklore, sage Parashurama has installed the idol. The temple is a part of the 108 famous Shiva temples in Kerala.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Pananchery
topPlaces.description: Pananchery is a village and gram panchayat in Thrissur district in the state of Kerala, India. It is located along the National Highway ( NH47) from Thrissur to Palakkad.

topPlaces.name: Banana Research Station, Kannara
topPlaces.description: Banana Research Station, Kannara is a research Station under the Central Zone of Kerala Agricultural University at Kannara in Thrissur district of Kerala, India. This research station was established in 1963 to carry out research on bananas and pineapples.

topPlaces.name: Vellanikkara
topPlaces.description: Vellanikkara is a suburban area of Thrissur city of Kerala, south India. Its only 9 km from Swaraj Round.

topPlaces.name: Pattikkad, Thrissur
topPlaces.description: Pattikkad or Pattikad is a junction in the outskirts of Thrissur district of Kerala, India. The junction is situated beside the Salem-Kochi National Highway.

topPlaces.name: Chembuthara
topPlaces.description: Chembuthara or Chembutra is a small village in Kerala, India, known for its Makarachowa festival. It is situated about 11 km away from Thrissur center.

topPlaces.name: Mary Matha Major Seminary
topPlaces.description: Mary Matha Major Seminary is a Christian seminary founded by Syro-Malabar Catholic Archdiocese of Thrissur in Mulayam, Thrissur, Kerala. It is affiliated to the Catholic University of Leuven, Belgium.

topPlaces.name: Cashew Research Station, Madakkathara
topPlaces.description: Cashew Research Station, Madakkathara is a research Station under the Central Zone of Kerala Agricultural University at Madakkathara in Thrissur district of Kerala, India. This research Station was established in 1973.

topPlaces.name: Agricultural Research Station, Mannuthy
topPlaces.description: Agricultural Research Station, Mannuthy is a research Station under the Central Zone of Kerala Agricultural University at Mannuthy in Thrissur districts of Kerala, India. This station was established in 1957 as Rice Research Station.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Pananchery Mudikkode Shiva Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Pananchery Mudikkode Shiva Temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 25–42°C and winters are 7–24°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Pananchery Mudikkode Shiva Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Cochin International Airport, Kochi (46 km) and the nearest railway station is Ernakulam Junction (Kochi) (65 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Pananchery Mudikkode Shiva Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Pananchery Mudikkode Shiva Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Pananchery Mudikkode Shiva Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Pananchery Mudikkode Shiva Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Pananchery Mudikkode Shiva Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Pananchery, Banana Research Station, Kannara, Vellanikkara, Pattikkad, Thrissur, Chembuthara.
